mapper.select: SELECT id, school_code, CASE WHEN #{language} = 'ko' THEN name_ko WHEN #{language} = 'en' THEN name_en ELSE name_zh END as name, CASE WHEN #{language} = 'ko' THEN city_ko WHEN #{language} = 'en' THEN city_en ELSE city_zh END as city, logo_url, status, created_time, updated_time, deleted FROM school WHERE deleted = 0 AND status = 1 ORDER BY name ASC
